evals.prompt: I just finished writing a TypeScript service file with a bunch of English comments. Can you convert all the comments to Japanese? The file is src/services/user.service.ts.
evals.expected_output: All inline comments, JSDoc, and log messages in the file converted to natural Japanese. Variable names and API-facing strings left in English.

evals.prompt: 日本語コメントお願い。さっき書いたコード、コメント全部英語のままだから変換して。
evals.expected_output: Scans recently changed files via git diff, finds English comments, converts them to Japanese. Adds missing comments to complex logic blocks.

evals.prompt: I wrote a Python Flask API handler but didn't add any comments. Can you add appropriate comments and make sure they're in Japanese?
evals.expected_output: Adds Japanese comments to the Flask handler — function docstring, complex logic, important constants. Does not over-comment obvious lines.
